description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, fenced yard featuring several trees and outdoor seating areas. The front facade includes a double garage, a wide driveway, and a covered porch with columns and a small tree. The house has multiple large windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard is landscaped with a wooden fence, lounge chairs, and a pergola, creating a comfortable outdoor living space. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the roofline is clean and contemporary. The overall design blends modern architectural elements with functional outdoor amenities.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and a landscaped fenced yard with outdoor seating and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, wide driveway, covered porch with columns, and main entryway.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, pergola, lounge chairs, and extensive fencing with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full fenced yard, multiple trees, outdoor seating, and the back of the house.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the driveway, side windows, and the transition between the front and backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in clusters
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent front door adjacent to the garage.
